notes: All _stats.css active classes (wh40k-quick-stats, wh40k-stat-badge and BEM children) have been ported. The wh40k-stat-badge BEM classes had already been stripped by a prior linter pass; only wh40k-quick-stats remained and was given its missing bg/border-b/border utilities before removal. All _compact.css active class references (wh40k-description-content, 26 occurrences across 14 templates) were ported with tw-text-[color:var(--wh40k-text-dark)] tw-leading-[1.5] tw-text-sm [&_p]:tw-mb-2 [&_strong]:tw-font-bold [&_strong]:tw-text-[color:var(--wh40k-text-dark)] and the legacy class removed. Other _compact.css classes (wh40k-compact-content, wh40k-origin-benefits, wh40k-origin-step, wh40k-benefit-group, wh40k-benefit-tags, wh40k-benefit-tag, wh40k-compact-description, wh40k-requirements, wh40k-item-sheet--compact) had zero template references and required no template changes.
